local_question: Can a correction undo a first trace, or does it necessarily arrive as another trace?
method_or_operation: project-specific artistic operation derived from Ulysses v4 Research Foundation
first_move: Build one medium-specific work probe grounded in the exact claim and correction versions.
conditions_and_refusals: No dashboard or comparative explanation as the primary work form.
change_conditions: Abandon the irreversibility premise if the evidence shows it is an artifact of the chosen apparatus.
return_obligation: Revise, challenge, archive or kill after exposure to Meridian and Ensemble returns.
